projectName: Sistema de Control Inteligente de Inventario
projectDescription: Automated inventory management system that performs ETL, ABC analysis, risk evaluation, Excel reporting, and automated email delivery.
keyFeatures: Automatic inventory loading from Excel files
ABC classification based on monthly sales
Risk evaluation and automatic replenishment recommendations
Automated chart generation (inventory status, ABC distribution)
Automatic email delivery with reports attached
publicApiSurface: enviar_reporte(remitente: str, password: str, destinatario: str, ruta_excel: str)
